import io

fn main() -> Unit
  let line = io.read_line()
  match line
  when Some(s)
    check(s)
  when None
    check("")
  end
end

fn check(_ s: String) -> Unit
  let n = string.len(s)
  mut i = 0
  mut depth = 0
  mut bad = false
  while i < n
    match string.byte_at(s, i)
    when Some(b)
      if b == 40
        depth = depth + 1
      else if b == 41
        if depth == 0
          bad = true
        else
          depth = depth - 1
        end
      end
    when None
      bad = true
    end
    i = i + 1
  end
  if bad or depth != 0
    println("NO")
  else
    println("YES")
  end
end
